news.headline: Addressable introduces CPW metric for Web3 marketing, emphasizing wallet activity. Wallet users 18x more likely to convert. Ethereum-based Etherealize targets institutional adoption on Ethereum rails.
news.summary: Addressable, a Web3 marketing firm, has introduced a new metric called cost per wallet (CPW) to enhance user acquisition tracking for DApps and blockchain businesses. CPW focuses on onchain wallet activity instead of traditional metrics like customer acquisition cost (CAC) or cost per click (CPC). The company claims CPW provides more precise insights, with users having a crypto wallet being 18 times more likely to sign up and seven times more likely to convert to crypto products. This metric helps in identifying high-value users and optimizing marketing efforts. CPW is seen as a more effective metric compared to CPC or cost per impression (CPM) as it distinguishes between high-intent users and low-quality traffic. The new metric could assist crypto projects in tracking user engagement in DeFi protocols, wallets, and exchanges. The broader crypto industry is also focusing on institutional adoption, with initiatives like Etherealize aiming to educate institutions about blockchain and Ether.

Law firm investigates Novo Nordisk investors' claims. Contact James Wilson if suffered losses between Nov 2, 2022 - Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP specializing in Securities Litigation, is urging investors who experienced losses in Novo Nordisk to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained securities in Novo Nordisk during the period of November 2, 2022, to December 19, 2024, and suffered losses, contact him directly to explore available options.

news.headline: Ounce of Hope introduces 4 THC seltzer flavors including Cherry Jane and Peach Buzz on shelves.
news.summary: In Memphis, Tennessee, on March 13, 2025, the top aquaponic cannabis company, Ounce of Hope, has confirmed its selection of four key THC-infused seltzer varieties. The recently introduced Cherry Jane and the popular Peach Buzz are part of the complete collection available for purchase, with all products now being sold, including the High Lime flavor.

news.headline: Perficient to exhibit AI-driven experiences and Marketo skills at Adobe Summit 2025, with ninth Women in Digital Breakfast.
news.summary: In Saint Louis, Perficient is set to showcase its comprehensive digital experience capabilities at Adobe Summit 2025, while also co-hosting the ninth edition of the Women in Digital Breakfast event.

news.headline: Smith + Howard introduces Business Office Services to help independent schools with operational inefficiencies and staffing gaps.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Smith + Howard, a prominent national firm specializing in tax, accounting, and advisory services, launched its new Business Office Services practice. This specialized offering aims to assist independent schools in tackling operational inefficiencies and staffing shortages.

news.headline: Inventor from Heath, Ohio creates a heated toilet seat cover for comfort and warmth. (CCT-5032) #innovation #invention
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Heath, Ohio, shared his inspiration behind creating a unique toilet seat cover that prioritizes user comfort. The inventor expressed a desire to develop a heated toilet seat cover to ensure individuals feel warm and at ease while using the restroom. The innovative design aims to enhance the overall experience of sitting on a toilet seat by providing warmth. This invention introduces a new approach to toilet seat covers, offering users an added level of comfort and luxury during bathroom use.

news.headline: Hydrogen aircraft market to hit $590.6 billion by 2050, growing at 16.4% CAGR, driven by sustainable aviation and hydrogen tech advancements.
news.summary: The rise of the hydrogen aircraft sector is fueled by factors like the escalating focus on eco-friendly aviation, growing regulatory backing for emission-free air travel, and ongoing progress in hydrogen propulsion technology. As of March 13, 2025, in Wilmington, Del., the market for hydrogen aircraft is witnessing significant growth.

news.headline: Karrat Foundation and Arbitrum launch Studio Chain on Arbitrum for Web3 entertainment & gaming, featuring AMGI Studios & My Pet Hooligan.
news.summary: AMGI Studios, known for their acclaimed production My Pet Hooligan, will be the main attraction in a groundbreaking blockchain entertainment ecosystem. On March 13, 2025, Arbitrum Foundation and Karrat Foundation revealed their collaboration to introduce Studio Chain, a blockchain platform designed to elevate the entertainment industry. This partnership marks a significant development towards utilizing blockchain technology in entertainment. The headliner, My Pet Hooligan, is set to bring its award-winning status to the forefront of this innovative blockchain ecosystem. This strategic move is expected to transform the landscape for entertainment, drawing attention from industry professionals and audiences worldwide.

news.headline: Enverus acquires Pearl Street Technologies to enhance grid reliability, addressing renewable energy interconnection challenges.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on March 13, 2025, Enverus, a reputable energy-focused SaaS company, revealed the acquisition of Pearl Street Technologies, a prominent firm specializing in addressing bottlenecks crucial for tackling interconnection challenges in renewable energy. This strategic move aims to enhance their capabilities and solidify their position in the industry. This acquisition signifies a significant step towards overcoming current hurdles in renewable energy, potentially leading to advancements in the sector's interconnection processes.

news.headline: Yiwugo.com, largest wholesale market in the world, showcases importance of digitalization in growing plush toy industry.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Yiwu, China, Yiwugo.com, the official online platform of the Yiwu Commodity Market, was highlighted as the world's biggest commodity wholesale market. China stands as the leading manufacturer of plush toys globally, and this market has shown consistent growth over recent years.

news.headline: Follett & Kortext merge to provide better digital learning materials for 1,000+ college campuses in North America.
news.summary: Kortext has introduced advanced digital learning features at Follett campuses to improve study tools effectiveness, enable better collaboration, and offer superior accessibility. This initiative was rolled out in Westchester, Illinois on March 13, 2025, as part of Follett Higher Education's endeavor to enhance student experience. Follett Higher Education, a prominent campus store operator in North America, caters to over 1,000 campuses across the region.

news.headline: Peoples Bancorp (Nasdaq: PEBK) authorizes $3.0M stock repurchase program with assets of $1.65B and equity of $130.6M.
news.summary: In Newton, North Carolina, on March 13, 2025, Peoples Bancorp of North Carolina, Inc. (Nasdaq: PEBK), which is the parent company of Peoples Bank located in Newton, NC, revealed that their Board of Directors has approved a stock repurchase plan. This program will see up to $3.0 million designated for repurchasing the company’s common stock. As of December 31, 2024, the Company reported assets totaling $1.65 billion and shareholders’ equity amounting to $130.6 million.

New England Realty Associates LP to distribute quarterly and special one-time distributions on March 31, 2025 to Class A Limited Partners and Depositary Receipt holders, with record date on March 24, 2025. MKT: NEN.
news.summary: In Allston, Massachusetts, on March 13, 2025, it was announced that New England Realty Associates Limited Partnership (NYSE MKT: NEN) is set to issue its quarterly distribution on March 31, 2025. This distribution will be made to Class A Limited Partners and depositary receipt holders who are recorded as of March 24, 2025. This distribution marks an important financial milestone for the company and its stakeholders.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs slashes S&P 500 year-end target from 6,700 to 6,200 points due to weaker growth outlook, trade tariffs, and policy uncertainty; still an 11% upside.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs has downgraded its year-end target for the S&P 500 index from 6,700 to 6,200 points due to factors like weakened economic growth outlook, increased trade tariffs, and a more uncertain policy environment. Chief U.S. equity strategist David J. Kostin referred to the once-dominant "Magnificent Seven" stocks as the "Maleficent Seven" in light of this market shift. The revision is driven by concerns about corporate earnings and equity valuations under the current circumstances. Despite the adjustment, the new target still suggests an 11% upside from the current levels. Goldman Sachs highlights reasons for the downgrade such as heightened policy uncertainty tied to tariffs, worries about economic growth, and a noteworthy positioning unwind among hedge funds. The market will require clearer catalysts for a sustained rally.

news.headline: Swimlane ranked top in AI security automation, named 'Ace Performer' among 20 vendors in Quadrant Report.
news.summary: Swimlane has been recognized as the sole Ace Performer out of 20 AI security and SOAR vendors, marking a significant achievement. The company, based in Denver, made the announcement on March 13, 2025, highlighting its AI hyperautomation technology designed for bolstering security operations. Swimlane has been acknowledged for its exceptional technology and has secured the top position in this category, distinguishing itself as a pioneer in the field.

news.headline: Bitcoin price falls 2% on US trade war fears, trading around $81,500. PPI below expectations, DXY weak. Fed unlikely to cut rates in March.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) experienced a 2.3% decrease, trading around $81,500 as US inflation dropped, following a decline in the Producer Price Index (PPI). Despite cooling inflation and a weakened US dollar, both stocks and crypto remained stagnant. The prospect of a US trade war intensifying due to slowing inflation led to warnings of increased market volatility. The Federal Reserve is expected to maintain its current interest rates with minimal chances of a cut, with the market anticipating potential rate cuts in May or June. Bitcoin price faced resistance at the 200-day SMA level, with strong upside resistance near $85,000. The article emphasizes that investment decisions should be made after conducting thorough research.

news.headline: NNIT A/S: Key decisions made at the annual general meeting of NNIT A/S. #resolutions #AGM
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This decline in unemployment is significant as it indicates a boost in job opportunities and economic growth. Additionally, the stock market has seen a rise of 500 points, reaching an all-time high of 35,000. Experts attribute this surge to increased investor confidence and positive economic indicators. The government has also announced a stimulus package of $1.9 trillion to further bolster the economy and support businesses and individuals affected by the pandemic. This financial aid is aimed at creating more jobs, improving infrastructure, and stimulating consumer spending. The overall outlook is optimistic, with projections suggesting a steady recovery in the coming months.

BMRT's technology can detect infected poultry, halting mass culling in bird flu crisis. (Characters: 83)
news.summary: In Stuart, Florida, on March 13, 2025, BMRT has unveiled a groundbreaking technology that can immediately identify infected poultry, halting the unnecessary slaughter of healthy birds. This innovation comes amid a surge in mass chicken culling because of avian influenza. The new technology is poised to make a significant impact by quickly detecting infected birds, potentially saving countless healthy animals from being culled.

Positive trends are seen across all key indicators during this period. The consolidated EBITDA stood at €410.6 million, reflecting an incre...

news.headline: Trump family in talks to acquire stake in Binance.US as founder Changpeng Zhao seeks pardon. Zhao, majority shareholder, looking to bring Binance back to US market after facing $4.3B fine and operating without fixed base.
news.summary: Members of President Donald Trump's relatives are in talks to obtain a financial stake in Binance.US, the U.S. division of the leading cryptocurrency exchange globally. This development aligns with efforts by Binance founder Changpeng Zhao, who served a four-month prison term following a 2023 admission of guilt for anti-money-laundering breaches, to seek a pardon from the Trump administration, per The Wall Street Journal. Zhao, still the primary shareholder, began negotiations with Trump associates last year in a bid to reestablish the company in the U.S. market. Binance, which confronted a $4.3 billion penalty and has been operating without a fixed base since its startup in Shanghai in 2017, is the subject of these discussions. The exact extent of the Trump family's investment is uncertain, with possibilities including a direct financial commitment or incorporation through World Liberty Financial, a Trump-supported cryptocurrency enterprise that was introduced... (Continued on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: CPSC cautions against using O3waterworks spray bottles due to fire hazard. Model SB100 HD affected; manufactured by Enozo Technologies Inc.
news.summary: The U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) has issued a warning to consumers on March 13, 2025, advising them to discontinue the use of O3waterworks' Sanitizing Home Enhanced Oxygen Spray Bottles Home Version with model number SB100 HD. This is due to a fire hazard associated with the product. This alert emphasizes the urgency of ceasing the use of the mentioned product to prevent potential risks.

news.headline: Global condom market expected to reach $26.3 billion by 2035 with 5.8% CAGR growth. Demand for ultra-thin, textured, flavored condoms rising due to customer needs for comfort and pleasure. Smart condoms with performance-tracking capabilities may gain popularity amongst tech-savvy consumers.
news.summary: The desire for increased comfort and enjoyment among customers is expected to drive a rise in demand for ultra-thin, textured, and flavored condoms. There is also a potential increase in popularity for smart condoms with performance-tracking features, particularly among tech-savvy consumers. This trend is predicted to continue in the coming years.

WalletConnect's Pedro Gomes launches WCT token; cites 'Token-Market Fit' for timing. Discussed Smart Sessions and WalletConnect Foundation.
news.summary: Pedro Gomes from WalletConnect recently discussed Smart Sessions, the creation of the WalletConnect Foundation, and the WCT token in an interview with Decrypt. The Foundation aims to further the adoption of decentralized finance (DeFi) and blockchain technology, with a focus on enhancing connectivity and interoperability. The WCT token is a key aspect of this initiative, serving as a utility token for users within the WalletConnect ecosystem. Gomes emphasized the importance of these developments in driving innovation and collaboration within the cryptocurrency space.

news.headline: Beko wins 6 iF DESIGN AWARDS in 2025 across Product, UX, and Communication categories, showcasing innovative design.
news.summary: Beko has been recognized for excellence at the iF DESIGN AWARDS 2025, securing a total of six awards for its Whirlpool, Grundig, and Indesit brands. These accolades span across categories such as Product, UX, and Communication, highlighting the brand's commitment to innovative and sustainable design. The awards were received in Istanbul on March 13, 2025. Beko's impressive performance reinforces its position as a leader in the industry, with a strong focus on delivering cutting-edge and environmentally conscious products.

Global AI in Video Surveillance market expected to reach $12.46 Bn by 2030 dominated by key players like Hikvision and Dahua.
news.summary: In Dublin, the market for AI in video surveillance is estimated to have a value of USD 3.90 billion in 2024. It is anticipated to experience significant growth and reach a value of USD 12.46 billion by 2030, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of x%. The report details that the market includes various offerings such as AI cameras, video management systems, and video analytics. Deployment options range from cloud-based to edge-based, while technologies utilized encompass machine learning, deep learning, GenAI, computer vision, and natural language processing.
